title: Famous Temples of Uttarakhand!
description:
Uttarakhand is not just about Kedarnath Temple—it’s a land of countless sacred sites.

From Gangotri Temple and Yamunotri Temple, believed to be the origins of the Ganga and Yamuna, to Badrinath Temple—together forming the famous Char Dham Yatra.

Explore Dhari Devi Temple and Tungnath Temple, the highest Shiva temple in the world.

Visit Naina Devi Temple and Mansa Devi Temple for blessings, and don’t miss Tapkeshwar Temple and Patal Bhuvaneshwar Temple for their unique spiritual experiences.

Also visit Kainchi Dham, a peaceful retreat attracting devotees from around the world.

Which temple have you visited… and which is next on your list?

Comment below and follow @realnehagupta for more such content.
